company_overview.content: TechSolutions IT is a full-service IT company providing managed IT services, cloud solutions, cybersecurity, and technical support to businesses of all sizes. Founded in 2015, we serve over 500 clients across various industries with 24/7 support and cutting-edge technology solutions.

services.content: We offer comprehensive IT services including: Managed IT Services, Cloud Computing & Migration, Cybersecurity Solutions, Network Infrastructure, Help Desk Support, Data Backup & Recovery, IT Consulting, Software Development, and Hardware Procurement. All services include 24/7 monitoring and support.

managed_it.content: Our Managed IT Services provide complete technology management for your business. This includes 24/7 network monitoring, proactive maintenance, security updates, help desk support, and strategic IT planning. We act as your dedicated IT department, ensuring your systems run smoothly and securely at a predictable monthly cost.

cloud_services.content: We provide complete cloud solutions including cloud migration, Microsoft Azure and AWS implementation, Office 365 deployment, cloud backup, and hybrid cloud architecture. Our team helps you leverage cloud technology for scalability, flexibility, and cost savings while maintaining security and compliance.

cybersecurity.content: Our cybersecurity services protect your business from digital threats. We provide firewall configuration, endpoint protection, email security, security audits, compliance management, employee training, and 24/7 threat monitoring. We follow industry best practices and compliance standards including HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and GDPR.

help_desk.content: Our Help Desk provides 24/7 technical support via phone, email, and remote assistance. Average response time is under 15 minutes for critical issues. We support all major operating systems, software applications, hardware, and mobile devices. Support is available in multiple tiers with guaranteed SLAs.

data_backup.content: We provide automated data backup and disaster recovery solutions with both on-site and cloud-based options. Our systems include continuous backup, point-in-time recovery, ransomware protection, and regular testing. We guarantee 99.9% data recovery and minimal downtime in case of disasters.

pricing.content: Our pricing is customized based on your business needs and size. Managed IT services start at $99/user/month. We offer flexible payment plans including monthly subscriptions and project-based pricing. Contact our sales team at sales@techsolutions.com or call 1-800-TECH-NOW for a free consultation and custom quote.

hours.content: Our support team is available 24/7/365 for emergency issues. Office hours for general inquiries are Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST. Sales and consultation appointments can be scheduled during business hours or after hours by request.

contact.content: You can reach us at: Phone: 1-800-TECH-NOW (1-800-832-4669), Email: support@techsolutions.com (technical support) or sales@techsolutions.com (new inquiries), Website: www.techsolutions.com, Address: 123 Technology Drive, Suite 500, Silicon Valley, CA 94025. Emergency support: Available 24/7 at our main number.

location.content: Our headquarters is located at 123 Technology Drive, Suite 500, Silicon Valley, CA 94025. We also have regional offices in New York, Chicago, Dallas, and Seattle. We provide remote support nationwide and can dispatch technicians to your location anywhere in the continental United States.

industries_served.content: We serve businesses across multiple industries including Healthcare, Finance & Banking, Legal, Manufacturing, Retail, Education, Non-Profit, and Professional Services. Our solutions are tailored to meet industry-specific compliance requirements and operational needs.

faqs.question: What is your response time for support tickets?
faqs.answer: Our guaranteed response times are: Critical (System Down) - 15 minutes, High Priority - 1 hour, Medium Priority - 4 hours, Low Priority - 24 hours. These are part of our Service Level Agreement (SLA) with 99.9% uptime guarantee.

faqs.question: Do you provide on-site support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide on-site support when remote assistance isn't sufficient. On-site visits are included in our Managed IT packages or available on-demand for an additional fee. We typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations and next business day for scheduled visits.

faqs.question: What cloud platforms do you support?
faqs.answer: We support all major cloud platforms including Microsoft Azure, Amazon AWS, Google Cloud Platform, and Office 365. We also work with specialized platforms like Salesforce and provide hybrid cloud solutions combining on-premise and cloud infrastructure.

faqs.question: Do you offer cybersecurity training?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide comprehensive cybersecurity awareness training for employees including phishing simulations, security best practices, password management, and compliance training. Training is available as on-site workshops, virtual sessions, or self-paced online modules.

faqs.question: Can you help with software development?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our development team specializes in custom software solutions, web applications, mobile apps, and system integrations. We work with technologies including .NET, Java, Python, React, and more. Contact our consulting team to discuss your project requirements.

faqs.question: What happens if my system goes down after hours?
faqs.answer: Our 24/7 emergency support team is always available. Call our main number and you'll be connected to an on-call technician immediately. For Managed IT clients, emergency support is included. For non-managed clients, emergency after-hours support is billed at a premium rate.

faqs.question: Do you handle hardware purchases?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle all hardware procurement including desktops, laptops, servers, networking equipment, and peripherals. We have partnerships with major manufacturers like Dell, HP, Cisco, and Lenovo, allowing us to offer competitive pricing. We also handle setup, configuration, and deployment.

faqs.question: What is your contract length?
faqs.answer: Our Managed IT services typically require a 12-month commitment, but we also offer month-to-month options at a slightly higher rate. Project-based work has no long-term commitment. We believe in earning your business through excellent service, not just contracts.

faqs.question: Are you compliant with industry regulations?
faqs.answer: Yes, we maintain compliance with major industry standards including HIPAA (Healthcare), PCI-DSS (Payment Card Industry), GDPR (Data Privacy), SOC 2, and CMMC (Cybersecurity Maturity). We can help your organization achieve and maintain compliance as well.

faqs.question: Do you provide network installation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete network infrastructure services including structured cabling, WiFi installation, router and switch configuration, VPN setup, and network security implementation. We design, install, and maintain networks of all sizes from small offices to enterprise data centers.
